summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that DE is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $573.51. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 38.9%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $596.11 and a significant trendline confluence around $584.50 (formed by 2 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
